summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations are planned. Open security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling; closed PRs remain closed; open non-security PRs are kept for maintainer review/proof because they are not merge- or close-ready from the hydrated artifact.

actions.reason: Already closed; retain historical classification only.
Valid focused work, but it needs proof/check resolution; no closure or merge is allowed in this plan.
Security-boundary-shaped daemon environment behavior should be handled by central OpenClaw security review, not PR inventory cleanup.

Open non-security compatibility PR with unresolved proof/review blockers; keep for maintainer or author follow-up.

Closed but security-sensitive leakage-related work should remain routed to central security context, with no backlog mutation.
